summary: Comprehensive testing of P0/P1 features: Editable AI Proposals, Multi-line Entry, Batch AI, Hourly Rate Logic, Related SMR Selection. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/extra-works/ai-batch correctly processes multiple lines sequentially with LLM
Each line in batch result includes hourly_info with worker_type, hourly_rate, min_applied flag
Small quantity pricing correctly applies min_job_price when estimated labor < minimum
POST /api/extra-works/batch-save correctly creates drafts with batch_id grouping
GET /api/ai-config/hourly-rates returns complete worker configuration (8 worker types)
Frontend ExtraWorkModal Phase 1: Multi-line entry with add/remove/duplicate buttons working
Frontend: Batch AI button shows correct line count 'Сметни с AI (N реда)'
Frontend Phase 2: Per-line editable cards display all pricing fields
Frontend: Worker type hourly rate badge displayed correctly (e.g., 'плочкаджия 25лв/ч')
Frontend: Related SMR shown as clickable chips with selection toggle
Frontend: Material checklist expandable with editable name/qty/unit fields
Frontend: Combined materials summary aggregates across all lines
Frontend: 'Приеми всички' button saves all lines including selected related SMR
LLM integration working via emergentintegrations (real API calls, ~10-15s per line)
seed_data_creation: Used existing project PRJ-001 (c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da). Test drafts cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extra Works batch AI features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/extra-works/ai-batch (batch proposals), POST /api/extra-works/batch-save (batch save drafts), GET /api/ai-config/hourly-rates (worker rates). Worker types: общ работник(15лв/ч), майстор(22), бояджия(18), шпакловчик(20), електротехник(28), вик(26), монтажник(20), плочкаджия(25). Frontend data-testid values: extra-work-modal, ew-title-{n}, entry-line-{n}, batch-ai-btn, result-line-{n}, save-all-btn. LLM calls take 10-15s per line so batch with 2-3 lines takes ~25-30s total.

POST /api/extra-works/ai-batch processes.notes: Returns per-line proposals with combined_materials and grand_total

Each proposal includes hourly_info.notes: Contains worker_type, hourly_rate, min_hours, min_job_price, estimated_labor_total, min_applied

Small quantity pricing applies min_job_p.notes: min_applied flag set when estimated labor < minimum and qty <= 10

POST /api/extra-works/batch-save saves m.notes: Returns ok=true, saved_count, batch_id, draft_ids array

GET /api/ai-config/hourly-rates returns.notes: 8 worker types with hourly_rate, min_hours, min_job_price

Frontend: Multi-line entry with add/remo.notes: Add line button works, duplicate (copy) button works, remove button works when >1 line

Frontend: Batch AI button with line coun.notes: Shows 'Сметни с AI (N реда)' with dynamic count

Frontend: Editable pricing fields.notes: Type, subtype, material price, labor price, total, qty all editable

Frontend: Worker type hourly rate badge.notes: Shows worker type and rate e.g. 'плочкаджия 25лв/ч (мин.)'

Frontend: Related SMR clickable chips.notes: Chips toggle selection, selected chips show green background with checkmark

Frontend: Material checklist expandable.notes: Expand/collapse works, can edit name/qty/unit, delete and add materials

Frontend: Combined materials summary.notes: Shows aggregated materials from all lines with quantities

Frontend: Приеми всички saves all lines.notes: Button text includes count of lines + selected related SMR, save closes modal

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - Real LLM via emergentintegrations
